name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound ground beef, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the ground beef until browned and drained of excess fat.
2. Wash and chop the lettuce.
3. Chop the green pepper, tomato, and onion into bite-sized pieces.
4. Grate the cheddar cheese.
5. Mix together the chopped vegetables (except the Doritos), grated cheese, and Catalina salad dressing in a bowl until well combined.
6. Just before serving, crumble up the Doritos and mix them in with the salad.
